entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Cereal crop evaluated in dry-seeded and transplanted systems

entities.description: A cultivar of rice evaluated in the study

entities.name: GANGAVATHI SONA
entities.description: A high-yielding, drought-resistant cultivar of rice

entities.name: PRASANNA
entities.description: A cultivar of rice evaluated in the study

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A dryland crop used in rotation with rice

entities.name: MUSTARD
entities.description: A dryland crop used in rotation with rice

entities.name: GREEN GRAM
entities.description: A dryland crop used in rotation with rice

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand water-deficient conditions

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of harvested grain to total above-ground biomass

entities.name: PRODUCTION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of producing agricultural output

entities.name: LAND AND WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output produced per unit of land and water used

entities.name: ECONOMIC RETURNS
entities.description: The financial profit gained from the cropping system

entities.name: DIRECT DRY-SEEDED RICE
entities.description: A method of sowing rice seeds directly into the field without transplanting

entities.name: ZERO-TILLAGE
entities.description: A method of planting crops without prior tillage of the soil

entities.name: NON-PUDDLING
entities.description: A method of soil preparation where the soil is not puddled before planting

entities.name: TRANSPLANTED RICE
entities.description: A traditional method of planting rice where seedlings are moved to a puddled field

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather causing water shortage

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available for irrigation and crop growth

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year characterized by increased rainfall

entities.name: SOIL AERATION
entities.description: The process of exchanging gases between the soil and the atmosphere

entities.name: RAINFALL PATTERN
entities.description: The distribution of precipitation over time and space

entities.name: CANAL WATER SUPPLY
entities.description: The provision of irrigation water through canal systems

entities.name: RAICHUR DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Karnataka where the study was conducted

entities.name: KARNATAKA STATE
entities.description: The state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGION
entities.description: A region characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: The pattern of crops grown on a piece of land over a period of time

entities.name: SOWING TIME
entities.description: The specific time when seeds are planted in the field

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The phase of plant growth where flowers and seeds are developed
